predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second person.

predicates.name: property_is_leased
predicates.description: The immovable property is subject to a lease.

predicates.name: served_as_family_principal_residence_at_estate_opening
predicates.description: The immovable property served the family as principal residence when the estate of the person opened.

predicates.name: has_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The person has the legal right to the lease of the immovable property.

predicates.name: excluded_from_lease_right
predicates.description: The person is excluded from the legal right to the lease of the immovable property.
